prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-15PC-3LB-PAYDIRT-PARENT Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 3lb Paydirt Backpack Gold Panning Kit Mini Sluice Box, 15pc (2 Styles) Description: We’ve paired one of our most popular gold panning backpack kits with a 3lbs bag of Bobby Bo paydirt, meaning you can practice and enhance gold panning and sluice box techniques at home, before taking to the field. And, while this gold panning kit is intended for travel (all the gold prospecting equipment included in this gold panning kit fit inside the drawstring backpack), the included bag of paydirt provides the opportunity to develop and hone fine gold recovery skills in preparation for a day at the claim site.

The 3lbs bag of Bobby Bo intermediate unclassified paydirt means classification work is required, as well as the removal of heavier magnetic materials like black sand and other unwanted organic matter. On the gold recovery front, this kit offers both panning or sluicing options; choose from either 10 inch or 12 inch dual riffle gold pans, or mini rubber sluice box! A great method for fine gold recovery alongside gold panning, the mini rubber sluice box measures 12 inches with no assembly required; constructed from one piece of TPR, the sluice box features x3 built in riffle patterns to aid in fine gold recovery.

All gold mining tools included in this gold panning kit covers you from start to finish in the gold recovery process, from processing and classification to retrieval and storage. Gold prospecting equipment includes: scoop, 1/30 classifier screen, and x2 dual riffle gold pans, mini sluice box, 8lbs magnetic classifier, scoop, magnifying tweezers, drawstring backpack, paydirt and fine gold recovery tools.

Lightweight and compact, this gold panning kit is great for fine gold recovery work at home, but is also ideal for evaluating onsite paydirt concentrate, or for hiking into remote claim sites locations where limited equipment is the only option. The kit also makes a great gift for new gold panning hobbyists, for packing with your camping gear or as a fun activity to do with kids.

Good luck! Search Terms: gold panning pay dirt paydirt kit set sluice mining prospecting pan tools equipment outdoors rock hounding hobby camping gear goldrush extract supersluice recovery travel backpack adult fathers day Features: - GOLD PANNING KIT WITH PAYDIRT: 3lbs bag of unclassified gold pay dirt paired with our popular lightweight backpack gold panning kit, means you can practice and enhance gold panning and sluice box techniques at home before taking to the field - 3LB GOLD PAYDIRT: Total weight is 3 pounds of unclassified paydirt filled with coarse gold flakes and fine flower gold. Black sand and larger raw material is present; working through this paydirt is a surefire way to develop gold panning and sluicing skills without needing to be on site - PORTABLE SLUICE BOX: A great method for fine gold recovery alongside gold panning; measuring 12 inches with no assembly required - TRAVEL BACKPACK: Drawstring backpack fits all gold prospecting equipment, making this gold panning kit ideal for evaluating onsite paydirt concentrate, for hiking into remote claim sites locations or for enhancing gold panning techniques at home; great gift for new gold panning hobbyists! - GOLD PANNING KIT INCLUDES: x2 dual riffle gold pans, mini sluice box, 1/30 mini classifier screen, 8lbs black sand separator, scoop, magnifying tweezers, drawstring bag, paydirt, and fine gold recovery tools === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
